name: sap-spektra
description: Mission Control for SAP Operations — monitoring, runbook automation, and intelligent remediation for SAP landscapes.

scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:e2e:ci: docker-compose -f docker-compose.ci.yml up -d && sleep 5 && cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate deploy && npm run seed && npm run start & sleep 3 && cd ../../frontend && npm run dev & sleep 5 && npx playwright test; docker-compose -f docker-compose.ci.yml down
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:backend && npm run typecheck:frontend
scripts.lint: cd apps/api && npm run lint ; cd ../../frontend && npm run lint
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
